title: Kana Vocab 12: もの, ゆっくり, ラジオ...

items.gloss: indicates reason or excuse; indicates dissatisfaction; indicates desire to be pampered or indulged
slowly; unhurriedly; without haste; leisurely; at one's leisure; easily (e.g. in time); well; sufficiently; amply; with time to spare; well (e.g. sleep); comfortably
record (e.g. LP); record (e.g. in sports); record (data structure)
